objective: Refactor MOGL/wrap by isolating generated unimplemented _gl*.m wrappers while preserving callable MATLAB OpenGL/GLU/GLUT/mogl wrapper filenames at root as public API entrypoints. Further root moves are blocked by MATLAB path/function-name public API risk: each root .m filename is the callable function name and moving it would make callers fail unless thousands of compatibility shims were generated.
completedSlices: Created wrap/unimplemented/ and moved all 294 root _gl*.m placeholder/unimplemented wrapper files into it.
validationReceipts: find wrap -maxdepth 1 -type f => 2380 callable public wrapper files remain at root by design
folder_refactor_audit was called; it failed because 2380 exact root facades were not enumerated in the tool input, but its unclassified output lists the exact callable root wrappers.
